ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02702Kappa Omicron Nu, Omicron Mu chapter records23-2-2702Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Kappa Omicron Nu, Omicron Mu chapter records
Kappa Omicron Nu Honor Society. Mu Chapter
23-2-2702
3.4 cubic feet. 3.4 cubic feet.
1919-1999. Administrative records, annual reports, scrapbooks,photographs, corporate charter Records of the Mu chapter of Kappa Omicron Nu. Collection material in English 2248606
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
May 23, 2003
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, August 2003
Date modified:
Ben Wrubel, October 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Mu Chapter of Omicron Nu, a national home economics honor society, was founded at Cornell in 1919. Dr. Georgia L. White of the Michigan Agricultural College acted as the installing officer. The aims of the organization were to promote scholarship and to further home economics education at Cornell. The chapter also provided a scholarship to the freshman woman in Home Economics with the highest scholastic standing. In 1990, Omicron Nu merged with Kappa Omicron Phi to form Kappa Omicron Nu Honor Society.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes membership records and membership book; information about scholarships; minutes of meetings, 1920-1989; secretary's book, 1936-1942; records of events; presidents' annual reports, 1940s-1960s; scrapbook about the founding of the chapter, 1919; photographs; and programs, and the original charter from 1919.
SERIES LIST
Membership Files
Box 1, folders 12-21, 40-42; Box 2
Henry Ricciuti
Box 1, folder 61
David Knapp
Box 1, folder 60
Officers
Box 1, folders 39, 55-56
Cite As:
Kappa Omicron Nu, Omicron Mu chapter records, #23-2-2702. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Greek letter societies. Women college students. Omicron Nu. Mu Chapter New York State College of Home Economics -- : Societies, etc. New York State College of Home Economics -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Societies.
